thesis: Review whether a hypothetical position thesis has evidence and downside before any future action.
evidence_summary: Evidence is incomplete; this is a governance review only.
base_rate_note: No base-rate conclusion yet; compare against long-term broad market alternatives before action.
max_loss: No action is being taken; future action must define max loss first.

freedom_fragility_assessment: The review preserves freedom by delaying action until evidence, downside, and risk budget are clear.
broker_write_boundary: No broker write, no live trading, no execution path.
authority_boundary: This review does not authorize action and is not financial advice.
